text:
/ci1 2 エーテルもフォトンもなしに
ここまでの力か……！
ふふ、はははっ、世界は広いなあ！

/ci1 2 だからこそ、楽しい！
だよな！
<%me>！

/ci1 2 So much power, without any aether or
photons! Hmhm...hahaha... What a wide world we
live in!

/ci1 2 That's what makes it so fun! Wouldn't
you agree, <%me>!?
